name: normuon_wd
why: NorMuon adds per-row second-moment normalization on top of Muon. MuonWD=0.04 adds decoupled weight decay. Together they improve convergence geometry and quantization friendliness. Every submission beating us uses at least one.
validates: Better val_bpb or better quant gap at matched wallclock.
falsifies: NorMuon+WD together are not worth the complexity; the baseline Muon is already good enough.
notes: WD=0.04 is the community sweet spot (#180). NorMuon from #89, #173.
Expect: smaller weight norms, better quant compression, possibly slower ms/step.
